brand_vibe: Fun, snappy, Canva meets professional Adobe tools. High energy, dark mode default, neon accents.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Control Room grid for dashboards. Tetris Bento grid for marketing.

surfaces_and_effects.cards: bg-[#0F0F13] border border-white/10 hover:border-white/20 transition-colors duration-300
surfaces_and_effects.tracing_beam: Use mask-image and framer-motion to create shimmering neon borders on active tool panels.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF007A] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-[#FF3399] transition-all hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,0,122,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:border-white/50 hover:bg-white/5 transition-all

components.inputs: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white focus:border-[#00E5FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00E5FF] outline-none transition-all
components.shadcn_overrides: Force all Shadcn components (Dialog, Select, Dropdown) to use dark mode colors. Overwrite popover backgrounds to #0F0F13 with border-white/10. Remove default Vercel look.

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for standard UI icons. Use react-icons for social media logos (Meta, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn).

hero_background.description: Abstract glowing neon lines on a dark background. Use with absolute positioning, object-cover, and low opacity (20-30%) behind the hero section.

feature_photo_1.description: Cyberpunk portrait. Use as a 'Before/After' demonstration image in the editor section.

feature_photo_2.description: Stylish futuristic portrait. Use as a sample image card for 'Neon Noir' filter preview.

landscape_sample.description: Cinematic sunset landscape. Use for the 'Golden Hour Glow' filter sample.

dashboard_preview.description: Creative agency team working. Use for 'Social Media Management' feature preview.

motion.hover: Scale up slightly (scale-105) on interactive image cards. Subtle translate-y-1 on buttons.
motion.page_transition: Fade in with a slight upward translation.
motion.editor_tools: Staggered fade-in for the filter sidebar list using Framer Motion.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over neon elements remains dark (#050505) for contrast. Use APCA guidelines.
accessibility.focus: Use focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF007A] focus:outline-none for keyboard navigation.
accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY. Apply data-testid to all buttons, tool toggles, forms, and canvas interactions.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly enforce dark mode globally. Set background to #050505 and text to #FFFFFF.
Use Tailwind arbitrary values for exact hex codes if they aren't in tailwind.config.js, e.g., bg-[#050505].
For the Editor Canvas page, construct a professional 3-pane layout (Left sidebar tools, Center Canvas, Right sidebar properties) using flex or CSS grid.
Apply 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (buttons, sliders, filter thumbnails).
Ensure the application routes are properly structured to support the 8 key pages outlined in the problem statement.
Do NOT use pure white #FFFFFF for large surface areas. Use #0F0F13 for panels.
Implement smooth micro-animations on filter selection (e.g., a glowing pink border when a filter is active).
